habitat: NW India origin; cultivated across tropics of Asia and Africa.
traditionalUsesEn: Nutrient-dense leaf vegetable; traditional uses for nutrition and general wellness in tropical folk systems.
traditionalUsesDe: Nährstoffreiches Blattgemüse; traditionell für Ernährung und Allgemeinbefinden in tropischen Volksheilkunden.
activeCompounds: Vitamins, minerals, isothiocyanates, flavonoids (composition varies with soil)
preparation: Cooked leaves and pods; dried leaf powder; seed oil (ben oil).
cautions: Root and bark not for casual use (alkaline toxins in some parts). Prefer culinary leaf/pod use.
historicalNotes: Promoted in modern nutrition programs; ancient Ayurvedic mentions.
